final_prompt.prompt:
Create an instructional infographic showing how to deploy Hermes in a Docker container and integrate with GLMCodingPlan (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a clean technical documentation aesthetic — exact visual style is yours
Composition: must be a 4-step numbered layout (1, 2, 3, 4) with clear visual separation between steps
Subject: must include Docker container deployment workflow, Hermes setup, and GLMCodingPlan integration
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a clear, professional instructional atmosphere — exact lighting is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1", "2", "3", "4" with corresponding Chinese descriptions for each deployment step
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 4-step structure with clear numbering; must show Docker, Hermes, and GLMCodingPlan elements
Avoid: must avoid cluttered layouts that obscure the step-by-step flow
